items.name: Haunted Toaster
items.flavor: Burns bread and whispers your name.

items.name: Haunted Toaster (Angry)
items.flavor: Launches toast at high velocity.

items.name: Toaster of Eternal Breakfast
items.flavor: Produces toast endlessly. You cannot stop it.

items.name: Sentient Dust Bunny
items.flavor: It follows you. You wish it wouldn't.

items.name: Gigantic Dust Bunny
items.flavor: It has mass. And opinions.

items.name: Dust Bunny (Eldritch)
items.flavor: You stare into the fluff. The fluff stares back.

items.name: Cursed Slinky
items.flavor: Goes down stairs. And back up. On its own.

items.name: Cursed Slinky (Tangled)
items.flavor: It untangles itself when you're not looking.

items.name: Slinky of Infinite Motion
items.flavor: It never stops. Never.

items.name: Ominous Music Box
items.flavor: Plays a tune you almost remember.

items.name: Broken Ominous Music Box
items.flavor: Plays two notes. Badly.

items.name: Music Box of Lost Memories
items.flavor: You hear a lullaby from your childhood. You never heard lullabies.

items.name: Possessed Rubber Duck
items.flavor: Squeaks without being touched.

items.name: Screaming Rubber Duck
items.flavor: You squeeze it once. It screams twice.

items.name: Duck of Eternal Echoes
items.flavor: You hear quacking in the distance. There are no ducks.

items.name: Forbidden Sandwich
items.flavor: You don't know what's in it. You don't want to.

items.name: Glowing Forbidden Sandwich
items.flavor: It hums softly. You feel uneasy.

items.name: Sandwich of the Ancients
items.flavor: It is older than civilization. Still fresh.

items.name: Mysterious Egg
items.flavor: Warm. Occasionally shakes.

items.name: Cracked Mysterious Egg
items.flavor: Something inside is moving. Slowly.

items.name: Egg of Impossible Origin
items.flavor: You hear faint breathing. It's not yours.

items.name: Cursed Mirror
items.flavor: Your reflection waves at you.

items.name: Smiling Cursed Mirror
items.flavor: Your reflection smiles. You don't.

items.name: Mirror of the Other You
items.flavor: Your reflection whispers: 'Soon.'

items.name: Ominous Jar
items.flavor: Something inside moves when you shake it.

items.name: Glowing Ominous Jar
items.flavor: The glow pulses like a heartbeat.

items.name: Jar of Infinite Mystery
items.flavor: You open it. You regret it.

items.name: Possessed Teddy Bear
items.flavor: Its eyes follow you.

items.name: Singing Teddy Bear
items.flavor: Sings lullabies in a language you don't know.

items.name: Teddy Bear of Eternal Comfort
items.flavor: You feel safe. You shouldn't.

items.name: Forbidden Remote
items.flavor: You press a button. Something somewhere turns off.

items.name: Glowing Forbidden Remote
items.flavor: You press a button. Something somewhere screams.

items.name: Remote of Absolute Control
items.flavor: You press a button. Reality flickers.

items.name: Eldritch Coin
items.flavor: The symbols shift when you blink.

items.name: Whispering Eldritch Coin
items.flavor: You hear faint chanting.

items.name: Coin of the Outer Realms
items.flavor: You feel watched by something ancient.
